# Skill: AI Generated Comment (Obligatory)

## Purpose
Ensure every newly created file and class includes the mandatory AI generation comment for traceability and auditability.

## Rules

### Mandatory Comment Text
The exact comment text must be:
```
generated by AI in GitHub cloud
```

### Where to Apply
- **New files**: Add the comment near the top of the file (after any package/import declarations but before class definitions).
- **New classes**: Add the comment in or directly above each new class definition.

### Consistency Requirements
- Keep the comment text **exact** — do not paraphrase or alter it.
- Apply to every newly created file without exception.
- Apply to every newly created class, including inner classes.

## Examples

### Java
```java
// generated by AI in GitHub cloud
public class MyService {
    // ...
}
```

### Python
```python
# generated by AI in GitHub cloud
class MyService:
    pass
```

### JavaScript / TypeScript
```javascript
// generated by AI in GitHub cloud
class MyService {
    // ...
}
```

## Rationale
This comment ensures that AI-generated code is clearly identifiable for code review, compliance, and auditability purposes.
